< Home >

GET restapi/personal/courses/{courseId}/features/v2

Gets features for the given course.

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseId

The course identifier.

 integer

Required

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Feature
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Name

The feature name.

 string

None.
Url

Url to the itslearning web page for the feature if it exists.

 string

None.
Features

The list of sub-features.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Feature

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "Name": "sample string 1",
  "Url": "sample string 2",
  "Features": [
    {
      "Name": "sample string 1",
      "Url": "sample string 2",
      "Features": null
    },
    {
      "Name": "sample string 1",
      "Url": "sample string 2",
      "Features": null
    }
  ]
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<Feature xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <Name>sample string 1</Name>
  <Url>sample string 2</Url>
  <Features>
    <Feature>
      <Name>sample string 1</Name>
      <Url>sample string 2</Url>
      <Features i:nil="true" />
    </Feature>
    <Feature>
      <Name>sample string 1</Name>
      <Url>sample string 2</Url>
      <Features i:nil="true" />
    </Feature>
  </Features>
</Feature>
